prompt:
[Verse]
Your touch is a whisper
A soft golden thread
I chase it through shadows
It runs in my head
The world’s just a canvas
Your colors they bled

[Prechorus]
Floating in a haze
Caught in your glow
Are you even real
Or a spark I’ll never know

[Chorus]
Unreal forever
But I feel you here
A love like a fever
Crystal clear
If this is a dream
Don’t wake me
Don’t wake me
Unreal forever
You’re my eternity

[Verse 2]
The stars write your name
But the ink disappears
I reach out to hold you
You slip through the years
Timeless and fleeting
You drown all my fears

[Prechorus]
Dancing through the void
Where the echoes grow
Are you just a myth
Or the truth I’ll always show

[Chorus]
Unreal forever
But I feel you here
A love like a fever
Crystal clear
If this is a dream
Don’t wake me
Don’t wake me
Unreal forever
You’re my eternity
title: Unreal Forever
tags: ballad, 118 bpm, warm synths, emotional, warm, deep, dreamy edm ballad, vocal, edm, deep emotional drop, ethereal vocal layers

prompt:
[Verse]
Moonlight dripping through the blinds, soft spills
Heartbeat syncopated, slow, no frills
She a warm tea, honey stirred, no chills
Words wrapped in velvet, time stands still

Gentle breeze, whispers in the quiet air
Promises exchanged like secrets, rare
Her eyes, a safe harbor, no despair
The world fades; it’s just us there

[Chorus]
Late night vows, no need to rush
Soft touch, built on trust
We ain’t chasing stars, just the hush
Peaceful love, no diamonds, just us

[Verse 2]
Vinyl crackle, backdrop to her laugh
Slow spins, moments split in half
Half dream, half awake, this our craft
Painted memories, love on the graph

Jazzy chords under words we weave
No masks, no tricks up the sleeve
Pure truth, every sigh we breathe
Forever carved where the soul believes

[Bridge]
Streetlights hum, casting gold on the floor
Time a slow river, no need to roar
Every glance, an open door
No fear, no doubt, nothing more
title: Late Night Vows
tags: lo-fi, mellow flow, mellow, late-night calm reflection tone, jazzy chords, tone, vinyl crackle, jazzy, rap

prompt:
[Verse]
Empty chair at the table, echoes in the room
Love felt eternal, now it's dust in the bloom
Broken clock hands, can't rewind the tune
Wounds in my chest howl louder than June

Mirror caught my eyes, reflection so hollow
Yesterday's shadow, today’s tough to swallow
Dreams in the rearview, shattered and shallow
The road ahead steep, but I know I gotta follow

[Chorus]
Shattered frames, but the picture ain't gone
Every heartbreak sings a new song
Tears dry slow, but the soul moves on
Gotta find light, even when it's all wrong

[Verse 2]
Rain taps the glass, like it’s got something to say
Tried to paint over pain, but the colors just gray
Every step feels heavy, night swallows the day
But the weight on my back ain’t here to stay

Letters in a box, tied with ribbons of blue
Each one a memory, of me and you
Burned bridges light paths, it's bitter but true
Ashes feed roots, now the flowers push through

[Bridge]
What’s lost ain’t forgotten, it’s carved in my bones
Lessons in the ache, like a chisel to stone
Pain taught me strength, now I walk alone
But in the silence, I found a new tone
title: Shattered Frames
tags: soulful, emotional, slow-flow, piano-driven with deep introspection; sparse drum patterns and soft vocal layering for emphasis, rap, slow
